structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State - Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If AHU SAT > room temperature, set primary airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint and series fan airflow setpoint ≤ OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.

candidate_entries.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
candidate_entries.evidence_text: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint and the series fan airflow setpoint shall be no higher than OA-min.
candidate_entries.judge_reason: Operational rule for primary airflow setpoint mapping in cooling mode
candidate_entries.review_notes: model_review_accepted: Operational rule for primary airflow setpoint mapping in cooling mode

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Control - Run Conditions and Start Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan runs whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is driven fully closed to prevent backward rotation. After a fixed time delay (15 seconds) with fan proven ON, the damper override is released.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating or Cooling, or Zone Group is in Occupied Mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Run fan. Before starting, drive damper fully closed. After fan proven ON for 15 seconds, release damper override.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

candidate_entries.evidence_quote: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.
candidate_entries.evidence_text: 5.10.5.5. Fan Control. Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure that the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.
candidate_entries.judge_reason: Fan start/stop logic and start sequence
candidate_entries.review_notes: model_review_accepted: Fan start/stop logic and start sequence

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Primary Airflow Alarm - Level 3
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, variable-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: When control loop is above minimum speed plus 15%, start stage-up timer. Each time timer reaches 7 minutes, start next relief fan and reset timer. Timer resets and freezes if loop drops below threshold.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Relief Fan Staging - Stage Down

structured_payload_candidate.summary: When PID loop is below minimum speed, start stage-down timer. Each time timer reaches 5 minutes, shut off lag fan and reset timer. Timer resets and freezes if loop rises above minimum speed or all fans off.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: PID loop output below minimum speed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage Down. When PID loop is below minimum speed, start stage-down timer. structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone-Des-OA-min is set to zero if window open or if occupancy sensor and unpopulated with occupied-standby permitted; otherwise set to the larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Priority: 1) Zero if window open. 2) Zero if occupancy sensor, unpopulated, and occupied-standby permitted. 3) Otherwise, larger of Varea-min and Vocc-min.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Setpoint Overlap Prevention
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Software shall prevent heating setpoint from exceeding cooling setpoint minus 0.5°C (1°F), unoccupied heating setpoint from exceeding occupied heating setpoint, and unoccupied cooling setpoint from being less than occupied cooling setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: When setpoints are configured or adjusted.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enforce minimum difference of 0.5°C (1°F) between heating and cooling setpoints; ensure unoccupied heating setpoint ≤ occupied heating setpoint; ensure unoccupied cooling setpoint ≥ occupied cooling setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The software shall prevent the following: a. The heating setpoint from exceeding the cooling setpoint minus 0.5°C (1°F) (i.e., the minimum difference between heating and cooling setpoints shall be 0.5°C [1°F]). b. The unoccupied heating setpoint from exceeding the occupied heating setpoint. c. The unoccupied cooling setpoint from being less than the occupied cooling setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone sends cooling SAT reset requests based on temperature exceedance and cooling loop output: 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes; 2 requests if by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes; 1 request if cooling loop > 95% until < 85%; 0 requests otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3 requests if zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes; else send 2 requests if by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes; else send 1 request if cooling loop > 95% until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Control Logic
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan shall run whenever zone is in heating or cooling Zone State, or if the associated Zone Group is in Occupied Mode. Prior to starting the fan, the damper is first driven fully closed to ensure the fan is not rotating backward. Once the fan is proven ON for a fixed time delay (15 seconds), the damper override is released.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling SAT Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send requests for cooling SAT reset based on zone temperature exceeding cooling setpoint or cooling loop output. If zone temp exceeds cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. If by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. If cooling loop > 95%, send 1 request until < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature or cooling loop conditions
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 3, 2, 1, or 0 requests as per conditions.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests. b. Else if the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 2 requests. c. Else if the Cooling Loop is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the Cooling Loop is less than 85%. d. Else if the Cooling Loop is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
